original: This strange looking pair of underpants is actually a deceptively advanced piece of experimental technology made to look like a Leithan’s front legs. By putting it on and activating it via the switch on the belt buckle, one can instantly grow a hardlight, leithan body from the projectors based on the suit’s backside. Guaranteed to feel like the real thing!
context: <<POS:05589494>> ardlight ‘taur suit",e.tooltip='This strange looking pair of underpants is actually a decept'

original: You put your naked [pc.legsNoun] inside the suit, shivering as you touch the red jelly. Knowing it’s best to get it over with quickly, you pull the pants up and close the belt before pressing the button on its buckle. The suit swiftly comes to life, the hardlight projectors on the back making the rest of a Leithan’s tauric body sprout from nothing behind you. At the same time, you lose all sensation from your lower body as the suit rewrites its senses with its own. You brace yourself against the nausea caused by the sudden addition of new limbs and the change of balance it brings, but find that the ordeal is soon over. You look behind yourself with satisfaction, admiring the chitin covered body of a Leithan standing there. You pat your flank, noting with satisfaction that your hand touched what felt like a real Leithan body and that your own flank felt your hand’s touch as well. You also feel your [pc.crotch] back there, where it belongs. At least, a hardlight copy that rests where it belongs on a taur’s body. You’re a taur now!
context: <<POS:05592127>> textify(['You put your naked [pc.legsNoun] inside the suit, '...])

original: You press the button on your belt buckle and brace yourself. Your Leithan body starts slowly losing its opacity at the same rate as you lose sensation in it. Soon enough, your entire hardlight body is gone, the loss of sensation giving you a nauseating feeling which you cannot focus on, as you’re already dealing with a drastically different center of gravity.\n\n\t\tOnce you recover, you take a deep breath and pull the suit’s pants down, freeing your regular
context: <<POS:05593442>> textify(['You press the button on your belt buckle and brace'...])

original: . You shiver as you feel them properly once more and stow the suit away.\n\n\t\tYou’re no longer a taur!
